name: Hermes Gateway
description: Self-improving AI agent gateway — connects to LLM providers (NVIDIA, OpenRouter, etc.) and messaging platforms (Telegram, Discord, Slack). Optimized for low-resource VPS deployment.

volumes.name: hermes-data
volumes.description: Persistent data: config, sessions, memories, skills, auth

NVIDIA_API_KEY.label: NVIDIA API Key
NVIDIA_API_KEY.description: NVIDIA NIM API key for LLM calls (free at build.nvidia.com). Required for the default deepseek-v4-flash model.

API_SERVER_KEY.label: API Server Key
API_SERVER_KEY.description: Authentication key for the OpenAI-compatible API server endpoint. Required for remote access.

API_SERVER_HOST.label: API Server Host
API_SERVER_HOST.description: Bind address for the API server. Use 0.0.0.0 to expose externally.

HERMES_GATEWAY_BOOTSTRAP_STATE.label: Gateway Bootstrap State
HERMES_GATEWAY_BOOTSTRAP_STATE.description: Auto-start the gateway on first boot. Set to 'running' to auto-start.

TERMINAL_ENV.label: Terminal Backend
TERMINAL_ENV.description: Terminal backend: 'local' (run commands in container) or 'docker' (requires Docker socket).

HERMES_BROWSER_DISABLED.label: Browser Disabled
HERMES_BROWSER_DISABLED.description: Disable browser tool (no Chromium installed; use cloud browser-use instead).

TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.label: Telegram Bot Token
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.description: Telegram bot token from @BotFather. Required for Telegram integration.

TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USERS.label: Telegram Allowed Users
TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USERS.description: Comma-separated Telegram user IDs allowed to talk to the bot.

TELEGRAM_HOME_CHANNEL.label: Telegram Home Channel
TELEGRAM_HOME_CHANNEL.description: Telegram chat ID for cron report delivery (daily summaries, alerts, research). Create a private group, add bot as admin, and use its numeric ID.

DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN.label: Discord Bot Token
DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN.description: Discord bot token. Required for Discord integration.

SLACK_BOT_TOKEN.label: Slack Bot Token
SLACK_BOT_TOKEN.description: Slack bot token (xoxb-...). Required for Slack integration.

SLACK_APP_TOKEN.label: Slack App Token
SLACK_APP_TOKEN.description: Slack app-level token (xapp-...) for Socket Mode.
